title: hedeoma quercetora
intro: Hedeoma quercetora, also known as Mountain pennyroyal, is a perennial wildflower native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as bloating, gas, and indigestion, due to its carminative and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Hedeoma quercetora include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, ease cold and flu symptoms, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hedeoma quercetora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
